ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for each run of the experiment */,
  "pte_value" REAL /* Value for PTE (Potential to Experience) parameter */,
  "ptes_value" REAL /* Value for PTES (Potential to Experience Scale) parameter */,
  "num_slots" INTEGER /* Number of slots in the experiment */,
  "num_attributes" INTEGER /* Number of attributes measured in the experiment */,
  "num_days_before" INTEGER /* Number of days before the event */,
  "num_days_after" INTEGER /* Number of days after the event */,
  "event_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of events in the experiment */,
  "rumination_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of rumination in the experiment */,
  "time" REAL /* Time when the experiment was conducted */,
  "chunk_value" INTEGER /* Value for Chunk parameter */,
  "traumatic" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the experiment involved a traumatic event (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "chunk_similarity" REAL /* Similarity value between chunks */,
  "bll" INTEGER /* Behavioral Inhibition/Latency scale value */,
  "imaginal_activation" INTEGER /* Imaginal Activation scale value */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time measured in the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the experiment */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the run */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the run */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the run */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_runs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the participant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the participant record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the participant record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_participants" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the association */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the association */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_participants_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traumatic_events" (
  "traumatic_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traumatic event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the traumatic event */,
  "intensity" INTEGER /* Intensity level of the traumatic event */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the traumatic event record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the traumatic event record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the traumatic event record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the traumatic event record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traumatic_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traumatic_events_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traumatic_events_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (researcher, clinician, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "psychological_scales" (
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each psychological scale */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the psychological scale */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the psychological scale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the psychological scale was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the psychological scale was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_scales" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "scale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the psychological scale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "scale_id")
)
